attestation: Attested in Clement of Alexandria (Strom. 1.28), Origen (In Joh. 19.7), Cyril of Jerusalem, and numerous other Fathers. The most widely attested agraphon in patristic literature.
fallback: Be skilled money-changers (γίνεσθε δόκιμοι τραπεζῖται). Attested in Clement of Alexandria (Strom. 1.28), Origen (In Joh. 19.7), and numerous other Fathers.
